com.ibm.cloud.scc.findings.v1.model

Class ApiOccurrence

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
      • com.ibm.cloud.scc.findings.v1.model.ApiOccurrence
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.ObjectModel

    public class ApiOccurrence
extends com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
    `Occurrence` includes information about analysis occurrences for an image.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  ApiOccurrence.Builder
      Builder.
      static interface  ApiOccurrence.Kind
      The type of note.

    • Method Detail

      • newBuilder

        public ApiOccurrence.Builder newBuilder()
        New builder.
        Returns:
        a ApiOccurrence builder

      • resourceUrl

        public String resourceUrl()
        Gets the resourceUrl. The unique URL of the resource, image or the container, for which the `Occurrence` applies. For example, https://gcr.io/provider/image@sha256:foo. This field can be used as a filter in list requests.
        Returns:
        the resourceUrl

      • noteName

        public String noteName()
        Gets the noteName. An analysis note associated with this image, in the form "{account_id}/providers/{provider_id}/notes/{note_id}" This field can be used as a filter in list requests.
        Returns:
        the noteName

      • kind

        public String kind()
        Gets the kind. The type of note. Use this field to filter notes and occurences by kind. - FINDING&#58; The note and occurrence represent a finding. - KPI&#58; The note and occurrence represent a KPI value. - CARD&#58; The note represents a card showing findings and related metric values. - CARD_CONFIGURED&#58; The note represents a card configured for a user account. - SECTION&#58; The note represents a section in a dashboard.
        Returns:
        the kind

      • remediation

        public String remediation()
        Gets the remediation. A description of actions that can be taken to remedy the `Note`.
        Returns:
        the remediation

      • createTime

        public Date createTime()
        Gets the createTime. Output only. The time this `Occurrence` was created.
        Returns:
        the createTime

      • updateTime

        public Date updateTime()
        Gets the updateTime. Output only. The time this `Occurrence` was last updated.
        Returns:
        the updateTime

      • id

        public String id()
        Gets the id. The id of the occurrence.
        Returns:
        the id

      • context

        public Context context()
        Gets the context.
        Returns:
        the context

      • finding

        public Finding finding()
        Gets the finding. Finding provides details about a finding occurrence.
        Returns:
        the finding

      • kpi

        public Kpi kpi()
        Gets the kpi. Kpi provides details about a KPI occurrence.
        Returns:
        the kpi

      • referenceData

        public Map<String,Object> referenceData()
        Gets the referenceData. Additional data for the finding, like AT event etc.
        Returns:
        the referenceData
